objective: Drive subscription signups for the new 3-month sampler bundle launching June 1.
target_audience: Considered Consumers (28-42, urban, premium grocery shoppers) who have visited the site but not subscribed in the last 90 days.
key_message: The 3-month sampler is the easiest way to discover your favorite single-origin without committing to a full subscription. New origins each month: Ethiopian Yirgacheffe, Colombian La Esperanza, Guatemalan Huehuetenango.
must_include: Cream and Espresso primary colors, Copper for CTA
must_avoid: Subscription hard-sell in the first 3 seconds
